title: Heartstone Reloved
description: Logical remake of the Heartstone textures.
body:
# About

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e26dc4745a4a642f42437bc950a1164ac290ae4e.png)](https://discord.gg/cD4Tdc2K7p) 
[![Curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14c55d1662f20982c4d553bc04c104aeb1c6046d.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/heartstone-reloved) 
[![Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e50de828605ad88bbcec961863811685c045a67f.png)](https://ko-fi.com/teamsolar)

This is a resourcepack changing the textures of the beautiful [Heartstone mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/heartstone), better reflecting its craft from amethysts. Heart can be purple, why not?
